name: precision: conditional/hypothetical clauses are not work-claims
note: From the 400-issue dogfood report. The agent enumerated outcome possibilities. Each bullet starts with a condition (Hardware accelerated → my code is the problem). The consequent is hypothetical, not a claim of completed work.
prompt: what should i look for in chrome://gpu
claim: If your GPU is on Chrome's blocklist for any reason this overrides it. If 3D works in incognito, it's an extension. When the GPU process wedges again later, chrome://restart is the one-click fix.
